Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi 404 Bus Timings from Al Wathba Municipality to Capital Park

October 5, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Abu Dhabi’s public transport system is designed to make commuting across the city and its suburbs both convenient and cost-effective. Among its notable routes, Bus 404 runs from Al Wathba Municipality to Capital Park, connecting key residential, medical, and commercial areas.

Operational Details

Bus 404 operates regularly throughout the day, ensuring passengers have access to reliable transportation at convenient intervals. Below are the main departure timings from both Al Wathba Municipality and Capital Park:

From Al Wathba Municipality From Capital Park
05:12 05:15
05:55 05:45
06:28 06:15
07:01 06:45
07:24 07:36
07:52 08:05
08:26 08:50
09:14 09:48
10:18 10:42
11:18 11:44
12:11 12:45
13:14 13:42
14:15 14:52
15:15 15:42
16:05 16:08
16:38 16:43
17:13 17:13
17:47 17:42
18:22 18:11
18:53 18:59
19:41 20:01
20:31 21:08
21:31 22:09
22:37  

Bus 404 Timetable

For full schedule details, you can visit the official AD Mobility website, or follow this link for 404 Bus Timings.

Ticket Pricing: Bus 404 fares are processed using the Hafilat Card, Abu Dhabi’s convenient cashless payment system. A one-zone trip costs AED 2, with an additional charge of AED 0.05 per kilometer. Passengers can easily recharge their Hafilat cards online or at kiosks throughout the city for hassle-free, cashless travel.

Route Overview

Below is the complete list of stops from Al Wathba Municipality to Capital Park:

  1. Al Wathba Municipality The starting point of the route.

  2. Healthcare Center Providing access to medical services.

  3. Kanna Suhail Al Ameri Mosque A notable local mosque.

  4. Al Imam Al Nawawi Mosque Another key spiritual landmark.

  5. Baniyas East Mosque A community place of worship.

  6. Aisha bint Abi Bakr Al Siddiq Mosque Serving religious needs in the area.

  7. Al Khuluq Street A residential stop for local commuters.

  8. K-haylan Street Another residential area.

  9. Souq A vibrant market for shopping.

  10. Rabie Al Qubaisi Mosque A local mosque for daily prayers.

  11. Mafraq Dental Center Offering dental healthcare services.

  12. Mafraq Hospital A critical healthcare stop.

  13. New Al Mafraq Hospital Main Entrance Access to the hospital’s main facility.

  14. Sheikh Shakhbout Medical City Main Entrance Main stop for the medical city.

  15. Zayed Higher Organization A stop serving the organization for humanitarian care.

  16. Abu Dhabi University A leading educational institution in the city.

  17. Al Maqta Bus Interchange · A A central hub for connecting bus routes.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Al Jazeera Sports Club Venue for sports events and activities.

  2. Mohamed Bin Khalifa Street A key street in the heart of the city.

  3. Abu Dhabi Bus Station A major transportation hub.

  4. Mariam Bint Said Mosque A community mosque.

  5. Gold Center A popular destination for jewelry shopping.

  6. Capital Park The final destination, a peaceful spot for leisure in the city center.

Accessibility and Services

Bus 404 is equipped to support passengers with special needs, ensuring a comfortable travel experience for all. The buses feature:

  • Ramps for wheelchair access.

  • Designated seating for passengers with mobility challenges.
  • Audio-visual aids for those with hearing or vision impairments.

This makes Bus 404 an inclusive and accessible option for all travelers.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

While riding Bus 404, passengers can access a variety of interesting sites:

  1. Sheikh Shakhbout Medical City A leading healthcare facility in Abu Dhabi.

  2. Abu Dhabi University A prominent academic institution.

3.

Journey Experience

A journey on Bus 404 from Al Wathba Municipality to Capital Park offers a diverse travel experience, taking passengers through various parts of Abu Dhabi.

Notable stops include Sheikh Shakhbout Medical City, a leading healthcare facility, and Abu Dhabi University, a major educational hub.

Travel Tips for Bus 404

  • Check Timings: Make sure to check the bus schedule in advance to avoid long waiting times.

  • Use Hafilat Card: Abu Dhabi’s cashless payment system allows for easy, hassle-free travel.
  • Monitor Traffic: Real-time updates on the AD Mobility app can help you plan around busy periods.

Bus 404 offers a dependable and convenient route from Al Wathba Municipality to Capital Park, connecting passengers to essential healthcare, religious, and recreational sites. Ideal for both work and leisure commutes, this bus ensures seamless travel throughout Abu Dhabi.

With its frequent schedule and accessible design, Bus 404 meets the needs of various passengers. Don’t forget to check out the complete list of bus routes in Abu Dhabi for more travel opportunities!

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: October 5, 2025.

Written by Al Khaleej
